edgeTypes.label: BOOKED
edgeTypes.description: Links a guest to a property through their booking history with channel and revenue data

edgeTypes.label: REVIEWED
edgeTypes.description: Links a guest to a property through a review with rating and sentiment

edgeTypes.label: LISTED_ON
edgeTypes.description: Links a property to a channel listing with sync status and pricing

edgeTypes.label: CLEANED_BY
edgeTypes.description: Links a turnover cleaning event to the property it services

edgeTypes.label: MESSAGED_ABOUT
edgeTypes.description: Links a guest message to the booking it references for conversation threading
